events.name: tbt-change
events.description: Fired when checked state changes; detail: { checked: boolean }

events.name: tbt-change
events.description: Fired when date selected; detail: { value: string } (ISO YYYY-MM-DD)

events.name: tbt-change
events.description: Fired when selected value changes; detail: { value: string }

slots.description: Custom value content (e.g. tbt-badge); hides value prop when slotted
Form inputs (tbt-input, tbt-dropdown, etc.) and tbt-button[type=submit]

events.name: tbt-submit
events.description: Fired on submit button click; detail: { data: Object }

events.name: tbt-input
events.description: Fired on every keystroke; detail: { value: string }

events.name: tbt-change
events.description: Fired when input loses focus (blur); detail: { value: string }

members.name: addRow
members.description: Append a blank row and focus the Item input.

events.name: tbt-change
events.description: Fired on every row edit, add, or delete; detail: { rows: Array, subtotal: number, vat: number, total: number }

events.name: tbt-menu-toggle
events.description: Fired when hamburger button clicked on mobile

events.name: tbt-close
events.description: Fired when modal closes via X button

events.name: tbt-cancel
events.description: Fired when cancel button or backdrop clicked or ESC pressed

events.name: tbt-change
events.description: Fired when selection changes; detail: { values: string[], labels: string[] }

events.name: tbt-search
events.description: Fired after debounce when search value changes; detail: { value: string }

slots.description: Action buttons displayed in section header
slots.name: actions

events.name: tbt-section-toggle
events.description: Fired when section collapsed/expanded; detail: { collapsed: boolean }

events.name: tbt-sidebar-toggle
events.description: Fired when sidebar collapsed/expanded; detail: { collapsed: boolean }

events.name: tbt-tab-change
events.description: Fired when active tab changes; detail: { name: string }

events.name: tbt-change
events.description: Fired when toggled; detail: { checked: boolean }
